naive_two_pass_3dgs.definition: formal RGB 30k endpoint followed by a fresh fully-unfrozen vanilla 3DGS optimization pass on thermal images
naive_two_pass_3dgs.initialization: retain every RGB checkpoint Gaussian value and active SH degree

rgb_sfm_t_3dgs.definition: vanilla thermal 3DGS initialized only by the formal RGB-derived cameras and sparse points

t_only_sfm_3dgs.definition: independent CUDA COLMAP SfM and vanilla 3DGS using only canonical thermal observations
t_only_sfm_3dgs.input_boundary: fixed-range Hot-Iron is rendered from pre-RGB-undistortion float32 temperature maps
t_only_sfm_3dgs.sfm: COLMAP exhaustive matching plus incremental mapper; all formal image IDs must register

save_semantics: original 3DGS final endpoint convention: iteration labels run from 1 through 30000 and the optimizer is not stepped after the final labeled iteration
